creator: dan@langille.org
text:
NOTE TO COMMITTER:
I see one problem with the pkg-plist but do not know how to correct it:

[root@ducky /usr/home/dan/src/databases/mantis]# make deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for databases/mantis
===>   Deinstalling mantis-1.2.3
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/developers/en/build' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/developers/en/build'
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/adminguide/en/build' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/adminguide/en/build'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
incorrectly specified?)
[root@ducky /usr/home/dan/src/databases/mantis]#

Fix: Upgrade to 1.3.2
